1900290.name: GO, GO, Knight!
1900290.description:
The thirst for wealth led the knight to these places.
Go to the dangerous dungeon filled with deadly traps and insidious mobs.
Will you be able to pass all the levels and get fame and gold, or will you remain a useless knight?

LEVELS

Quality and atmospheric levels filled with many traps and enemies. Some of them cannot be passed without certain abilities that can be obtained from the merchant.

TRAPS

Several types of traps that will make you nervous. This is a real test for your reaction, because most of the traps only need one touch to send the knight to the very beginning. But be careful, sometimes things are not so obvious!

ENEMIES

What are dungeons without skeletons? This pile of bones is ready to attack at any moment. What about lava cubes? They have already cooled down a bit, but they can still burn you with fireballs. A live cannon will not allow you to get very close to it. Do not forget that some decorative elements can be inhabited by an ancient spirit! In the end, you will have to fight the most important creature in this dungeon.

GRAPHICS

Pleasant voxel graphics with a side view, from which the spirit of retro games blows. The visual effects add to the atmosphere of a truly dark and dangerous dungeon.
1900290.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语
